title: SQL: can't use variable name staring with _digit in SQL func
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), value FLOAT);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, value) VALUES (1, 'test', 3.14);
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION foo(arg1 INTEGER) RETURNS INTEGER AS $$ BEGIN RETURN arg1;
key_bug_features: Variable names cannot start with a digit in SQL functions
